understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to solve puzzle levels by maneuvering selectable pieces to push blocks onto goal positions (+), progressing through all levels within the step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the selected piece (P) by one cell (3 pixels) in the direction unless blocked by walls (#) or without pushing capability; adjacent pushable blocks (B) can be pushed along. CLICK switches control to another selectable (S) at the exact pixel position. Multiple selectables exist, and movement was blocked when attempting to go beyond [15,21] rightward.
